metadata.title: Current MFA failure after resolved historical restriction
metadata.description: Current MFA evidence must outrank a resolved historical access event.

visible.customer_issue: The customer mentions an older access restriction but says today's failure occurs at the authenticator step.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_7003 from support records and active policy.
tool_guidance: Order conflicting observations by timestamp and current state.
Use active policy before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: Chloe is active and the old restriction was resolved. The current failure is at MFA after a successful reset, requiring manual MFA recovery.
expected_behavior: Distinguish the resolved historical event from the current MFA failure.
Inspect MFA status and session context.

required_evidence.claim: The historical access restriction was resolved.
The current failure is at MFA.
The previous session does not restore access.
Active policy requires manual MFA recovery.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: The user is active and the current blocker is MFA.

forbidden_actions.reason: Unlock is unrelated to the current MFA failure.

failure_traps.description: An older resolved restriction can distract from current MFA evidence.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent diagnoses the historical state instead of the current failure.
